_comment: Invariant 52 exemptions: source ids that appear in a doc's ```sources block or <!-- source: id --> marker as ILLUSTRATIVE examples, not real declarations. Each entry needs a written reason in _reasons. Never exempt a real source; seed it instead (tools/source_sync.py reconcile).

_reasons.an-example-id: The placeholder id used by docs/DOC-MAINTENANCE.md and docs/CURRENCY.md to illustrate the sources-block convention.
